other_observers: Carol Sullivan; Carol Sullivan found it at 9:30 on the same day.
specific_location: It was about 3 miles from the Stove Prairie School. To get there go up Risk Canyon from Bellvue, then when you get to the only stop sign after going up Risk Canyon go straight. At that corner is the Stove Prairie School.
description: Olive colored back, cream colored head with 4 dark brown stripes 2 on top of the head and 1 going through each eye. The belly is a lighter bream color than the head. It had pink legs, long bicolored bill, and a short tail.Behaviors: It was scratching around in the grass trying to find food. When it would fly it would only fly a short distance and go back to trying to find food.Call: Didn't hear it call or singPlumage: Adult
